name: rentsure-workspace
description: RentSure Decentralized Rental Deposit Escrow workspace

scripts.workspace:build: npm run contract:build && npm run frontend:build
scripts.workspace:test: npm run contract:test && npm run frontend:test
scripts.workspace:lint: npm run contract:fmt && npm run contract:clippy && npm run frontend:lint
scripts.workspace:verify: npm run workspace:lint && npm run workspace:test && npm run workspace:build
